lrc:
[00:30.64]Every road has broken stones
[00:34.42]Every heart has walked alone
[00:37.92]Every dream has faced the rain
[00:41.48]Still we rise again
[00:44.94]There were nights without a light
[00:48.48]Days that felt too hard to fight
[00:51.94]Still the fire never died
[00:55.52]Deep inside
[00:57.68]One more breath
[01:02.18]One more chance
[01:05.68]One more step
[01:09.18]We advance
[01:13.16]We keep going
[01:16.18]We keep climbing
[01:19.18]Through the wind
[01:23.18]Through the silence
[01:25.92]When the world says "turn around"
[01:31.92]We'll stand our ground
[01:34.16]Side by side
[01:36.92]We won't stop now
[01:41.02]We keep going
[01:45.58]Higher
[01:49.38]Higher
[01:52.76]Together
[02:01.34]Every mountain standing tall
[02:05.26]Started from a step so small
[02:08.76]Every answer that we found
[02:12.28]Came without a sound
[02:15.76]Every scar became our strength
[02:19.14]Every mile became our faith
[02:22.80]Every ending brought us here
[02:26.28]Stronger than our fear
[02:31.14]When tomorrow feels too far
[02:37.88]We'll become each other's stars
[02:43.14]Holding on
[02:47.06]Moving on
[02:50.48]Until the morning comes
[02:57.68]We keep going
[03:00.56]We keep climbing
[03:04.06]Nothing's ever
[03:06.68]Strong enough to break us
[03:11.60]Every dream
[03:13.06]Still survives
[03:14.48]Every hope
[03:16.52]Still alive
[03:18.48]Side by side
[03:22.10]Forever
[03:25.16]We keep going
[03:29.64]Higher
[03:33.18]Higher
[03:37.80]Together
[03:41.84]Keep going...
[03:44.24]Keep believing...
[03:49.44]The story isn't over...
